_comment: CANONICAL agent safety blocklist — the keywords an autonomous agent must never act on without explicit human confirmation. One list, three consumers: apple/.../SafetyBlocklist.swift, android/.../SafetyBlocklist.kt, src/services/agent/actionExecutor.ts. scripts/check_safety_parity.py enforces exact set equality in CI (the lists had silently drifted — desktop had 7 keywords the twins lacked and was missing 16 of theirs; audit Q-014). RULES: entries may only be ADDED, never removed (docs/AGENT_AUTONOMY_PLAN.md §3.7). MATCH SEMANTICS, identical on all platforms: single words match on Unicode word boundaries ('pay' must NOT fire on 'repay', 'pin' not on 'opinion'); multi-word phrases match as plain substrings.
